user_system_path: Dashboard/UI seams must be proven with the same CI lane that can fail them.
forbidden_files_raw: `app/**`, `components/**`, `lib/**`, `supabase/migrations/**`, `app/api/stripe/**`, controller/autopilot files, Playwright route tests, paid generation routes, outbound email paths, schema migrations, destructive DB actions
required_local_proof: npx vitest run scripts/__tests__/brandon-doctrine.test.ts tests/config/__tests__/docs-source-of-truth.test.ts --reporter=verbose; npm run build; npm run lint; npm run health
required_product_proof: Not applicable: this seam changes the active proof rule and regression guard only; the affected dashboard product lane was already proven in d654c64 with the permanent dashboard/UI gate.
required_browser_proof: Not applicable for doctrine-only CI-parity guard.
acceptance_condition: Active doctrine requires every seam to include the affected CI lane in local proof, and dashboard/UI work specifically requires build, lint, large-file-splits, dashboard-navigation, and authenticated-routes.
stop_condition: Stop if doctrine guard, docs source-of-truth guard, build, lint, health, push, or GitHub CI fails; do not touch product code, controller/meta code, backend/API, paid generation, Stripe, schema, or destructive DB work.
source_truth_finding: For every seam, proof must match CI. Local proof that does not include the affected CI lane is not proof.
required_closure_update: Encode the CI-parity proof rule in AGENTS.md and ACCEPTANCE_GATE.md, add regression coverage, update ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md, and append SESSION_HISTORY.md.
browser_proof_command: Not applicable for doctrine-only CI-parity guard.
anti_regression_checks: AGENTS.md states proof must include the affected CI lane
ACCEPTANCE_GATE.md states local proof omitting the failing CI check does not count
dashboard/UI proof ladder names build, lint, large-file-splits, dashboard-navigation, and authenticated-routes
brandon-doctrine regression fails if the dashboard/UI proof ladder drifts
next_command: Commit and push the CI-parity proof rule only, then verify GitHub CI green on the new head.
